## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Security hardening

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` if user flows changed
- [ ] Manual smoke test if UI changed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or setup changed

## OpenSaga Fit

- [ ] Keeps the Proposal -> Vote -> Canon model intact
- [ ] Uses existing UI/components where practical
- [ ] Keeps Supabase access behind services, hooks, or `src/lib`
- [ ] Does not introduce vendor lock-in for AI providers
- [ ] Does not commit secrets, real user data, or generated build artifacts

## Screenshots or Notes

Add screenshots, short clips, or implementation notes when helpful.
